Description:
Represents a Table of Contents (TOC) component that provides navigation links to sections within a document.
Remarks: The MudXOutline component allows users to navigate through sections of a document or page. It supports features such as customizable styling, scroll spying, and dynamic section registration. The TOC can be positioned on the left or right side of the viewport and includes options for rendering additional content above or below the section links.

Parameters.Name: ContentDrawerOpen
Parameters.Description:
Whether the Table of Contents drawer is open or closed
Remarks: Defaults to true

Parameters.Name: Width
Parameters.Description:
The width of the Table of Contents drawer in pixels.
Remarks: Defaults to 200. Values such as 200 or 300 become 200px or 300px respectively.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description:
The color of the Table of Contents drawer
Remarks: Defaults to Transparent

Parameters.Name: Headline
Parameters.Description:
The text displayed above the section links, this will display at the top of the MudDrawer if there is at least one section.
Remarks: Defaults to "Contents"

Parameters.Name: ZIndex
Parameters.Description:
The z-index of the Table of Contents drawer
Remarks: Defaults to 999.

Parameters.Name: UnderlineActiveSections
Parameters.Description:
Whether to underline the active section
Remarks: Defaults to true

Parameters.Name: ScrollToTopVisible
Parameters.Description:
Whether the scroll to top button is visible
Remarks: Defaults to true

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content of the Table of Contents Document

Parameters.Name: HeaderIndexContent
Parameters.Description: Option content above the table of contents

Parameters.Name: FooterIndexContent
Parameters.Description: Option content below the table of contents

Parameters.Name: Anchor
Parameters.Description:
Where you want the Table of Contents to be rendered
Remarks: Defaults to Right. Only Valid values are Left and Right.

Parameters.Name: ScrollContainerSelector
Parameters.Description:
The CSS selector used to identify the scroll container, if using an element id use "#" first and ensure the element starts with a letter. If using an element class use "." first.
Remarks: Defaults to "html", if this is empty or null html will be used

Parameters.Name: SectionClassSelector
Parameters.Description:
The class name to identify the HTML elements that should be observed for viewport changes inside the ScrollContainerSelector.
Remarks: Defaults to "mudx-toc-section"

Parameters.Name: StyleVariant
Parameters.Description:
The Style Variant to apply to the Table of Contents area. Options are Bullet, Scroll, Minimal, and None.
Remarks: Defaults to Scroll

Parameters.Name: TOCBreakpoint
Parameters.Description:
The Breakpoint at which to hide the Table of Contents
Remarks: Defaults to Md

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description:
The CSS classes applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. You can use spaces to separate multiple classes. Use the Style property to apply custom CSS styles.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description:
The CSS styles applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. Use the Class property to apply CSS classes.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description:
The arbitrary object to link to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to associate additional information with this component, such as a model containing data for this component.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description:
The additional HTML attributes to apply to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to provide additional HTML attributes during rendering such as ARIA accessibility tags or a custom ID.

PublicProperties.Name: Sections
PublicProperties.Description: The sections of the Table of Contents, this includes _subSections

PublicProperties.Name: Level
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the current level of the object.

Methods.Name: PositionIndex
Methods.Description: Causes an immediate repositioning of the Index

Methods.Name: RegisterSectionAsync
Methods.Description: Adds a section to the Table of Contents

Methods.Name: ScrollToSection
Methods.Description: Scrolls to a section based on the fragment of the uri. If there is no fragment, no scroll will occurr
